name: chat-kit
description: Shared chat toolkit — scope-typed threads (an order, an inquiry, a salon↔customer pair) with a policy that decides who chats with whom, realtime delivery through a transport seam, presence-aware push fan-out for offline recipients, unread counts, system messages and rate limiting. Pairs with @aymenkits/auth-core (socket handshake auth) and @aymenkits/notify-core (offline push) by shape, never by import.
